name: National Democratic Training Committee
subject: Your Weekly TL;DR Download
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Training Committee, TrainDemocrats
body:
Get ready for the Great Democratic Debrief!
| | | | |
---
| | | | Peter – Next week’s word is DEBRIEF.

On Monday, we’re launching the first ever Great Democratic Debrief — our latest initiative to problem solve, strategize, and prioritize training and resources for future election cycles.

And YOU play a major role.

That’s right, your campaign stories are central to the success of our mission and the Democratic Party for years to come.

This year Democrats succeeded in places we wouldn’t have imagined eight, four, or even two years ago.

But folks on the ground took lessons from past losses and turned them into major victories for our party, and our country.

That’s what we’re aiming to do with the GDD — whether you won or lost, we want to hear about your successes and the things you wished you had done differently.

So if you can, be a part of the important conversation and register for one of our Great Democratic Debrief sessions today. Event details below.
---
## Great Democratic Debrief

Click the link below to register for your region’s debrief session. Space is limited. Register now to reserve your spot.

Join us November 19 at 1pm ET for a [Post-Election Q&A: How to Have an Effective Political Campaign Debrief.](https://t.dripemail2.) [REGISTER NOW](https://t.dripemail2.)

Yes, there is one more week to complete those 2021 cohort applications. [But don’t wait until the last minute to get applications in! name: Marco Rubio
subject: 70% of Republicans Agree
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
Peter,
_America 's freedom and democracy are centered around one constant: free and fair elections. If we lose confidence in our election process we will lose everything._
Despite what the media and those on the radical left want you to believe, it is not their place to declare the winner of a Presidential election when it has not yet been made official. Our country has processes and laws for close elections. They allow candidates the right to contest votes potentially cast in violation of the law. They allow the right to present potential evidence of fraud or misconduct in a court of law. All of which is well within our country's election laws and all of which has been used by both parties in past races.
**What 's inexcusable is the bias from the liberal media.**
For the past _FOUR YEARS_ the radical left and their media lackeys said Russia determined the outcome in 2016, supported Democrats when they went to court over the 2018 gubernatorial race in Georgia and _**TO THIS DAY** _claim that race was illegitimate.
_**The liberal media was appalled and disgusted by the 'dangers' of Trump rallies, but now applaud parties and celebrations in the streets because they support Joe Biden?**_ It's sickening and no surprise that 70% of Republicans are not confident in the outcome of this election.
[_**Will you stand with us against the bias of liberal media?**_](http://links.makingagreateramerica.com/u/click?_t=61da4500de824401a8b93478db1cc37b&_m=504032dd9aba4baaa613ef2916c5e804&_e=ls_c5zx7bY9oaTIgN1U2WkLP4BKI9wuGRpWSU8IyuWe9s8mf76PR2k2qHUacYdR5aYzn4b2GXL6B27PHQuF6oXLF9k6oI11tYK8moeEhYehLB14HMfnB3c1qy2F1TldmoToRF0_UKtTUlJhg0K0k5pvKfO_pEdsGbR4Cs8PrHqZcIVrpYR_mh8L6DnU46BTSRuPkgcw0vf_i9SDTYsJxHPWT7fLl73NXsNflxI4XPhZUWkqJEzssjRQN9Kdq-RrJK3Iu5sxkbYkDLPpeM4AVMd3VVxQ_Ra_hru-zUJ9T8RvRePNmBsE5IqlAHfGuYiS8w2Yg0dT1DJJ7cawSs0oIWjmk6IDVgsNMvq1RrsU3mEhUVYDXTmcrPSqNeFvV-1DeWTnRN4LmZDcjjCx3cMNvtZoGwhHZU8pRlRYnhck_ZhGafrm5j_nGz4nr3euOcXcxVeGi-WRqVC2q6BoqwOq1WdIAvifpgNAtUbdG3jB1yua0Qr896ZP3bOhH1OEGOq4n6lswH93kij4YNYxgjhlypE4P0Fk0GlmKG_brXOx9XuM%3D) We can't allow their personal political opinions to stand in the way of our democracy any longer. That's why we're garnering support to stand **_AGAINST_** their liberal media bias and call for them to stay _**OUT**_ of the election process.
[_**STAND AGAINST THE LIBERAL MEDIA BIAS >>> ADD YOUR NAME**_](http://links.makingagreateramerica.com/u/click?_t=61da4500de824401a8b93478db1cc37b&_m=504032dd9aba4baaa613ef2916c5e804&_e=ls_c5zx7bY9oaTIgN1U2WkLP4BKI9wuGRpWSU8IyuWe9s8mf76PR2k2qHUacYdR5aYzn4b2GXL6B27PHQuF6oXLF9k6oI11tYK8moeEhYehLB14HMfnB3c1qy2F1TldmoToRF0_UKtTUlJhg0K0k5pvKfO_pEdsGbR4Cs8PrHqZcIVrpYR_mh8L6DnU46BTSRuPkgcw0vf_i9SDTYsJxHPWT7fLl73NXsNflxI4XPhZUWkqJEzssjRQN9Kdq-RrJK3Iu5sxkbYkDLPpeM4AVMd3VVxQ_Ra_hru-zUJ9T8RvRePNmBsE5IqlAHfGuYiS8w2Yg0dT1DJJ7cawSs0oIWjTismdqyMRQdyusp5Z2b2JXaUA9PFZX4JYCHN_jJdSbo_kIZbbg5Fsmqsu64aYn0IqcyzqxsFSwGLg0_eIADaKcFhrCUrk0BEDOXhZWyjiZ02dZJgsLBXlpLu-NRN8Dvx-C7KdQpGjfKdKRLmFNp6LxexpllAVDJLhuvW2QMyeWJuoQB_H5sEcF_DzGduiQKx_zhnZgtRcwM4_Iwk49CaI%3D)
The fate of our elections lies solely within the hands of the American people. It seems as though the media has forgotten that. name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Our Streak Continues
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
This Election Day was all about extending winning streaks for Indiana Republicans. Of course, after an election is when the real work of governing... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/our-streak-continues?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Our Streak Continues **_
This Election Day was all about extending winning streaks for Indiana Republicans. Of course, after an election is when the real work of governing begins. That’s why it was an honor this week to chair caucuses for our supermajorities in the Indiana House and Senate. In a year when many observers were predicting we would lose seats in the statehouse, we added a net of four seats in the House and held our supermajority in the Senate.

In the House Todd Huston was reelected Speaker and in the Senate, Rod Bray will again serve as President Pro Tem.

While it was relatively quiet in Indiana, there is much going on across the country. President Trump and his team continue to look at each state’s election results to ensure that they are accurate and only comprised of legally cast ballots. As a member of the RNC, I know that his team will have the resources needed to complete this process.

And in Georgia, the two Republican Senate candidates and their teams are preparing for runoff races. There is information below on how you can help. These two races will decide the control of the critical US Senate. Please help if you can!
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
|
---
| **_Thank you, Veterans_** Governor Holcomb and First Lady Janet Holcomb joined Hoosiers in thanking our veterans this past week on Veterans Day. Thank you to all who served!
---
| |
---
| **_We Need Your Help in Georgia_**
Hoosiers won the home game, easily. Now we need a road win.

If Democrats get control of the Senate, with Nancy Pelosi already caving to the demands of the socialist Squad in the House, we'll see a radical, leftwing agenda like never before. Packing the Supreme Court, abolishing the Electoral College, The Green New Deal, statehood for Washington DC, defunding the police, and all the other leftwing wish list items will be one step closer to happening.

This is where you come in. Can you volunteer a weekend or two for Senators David Perdue and Kelly Loeffler between now and the runoff on January 5?

Hoosiers willing to deploy to Georgia and volunteer by making calls and knocking on doors to save our country should fill out the link below.
[\--> Click here to volunteer for Senator David Perdue and Kelly Loeffler in Georgia <\--](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e97697b483&e=1acd9bb3d6)
Expenses such as flights, hotels, and meals will be covered for trips a weekend or longer. The runoff is January 5th, so you can go anytime from now until then.
---
|
---
| **_News You Can Use_** **Governor Eric Holcomb **[announces judicial appointments for the Marion County Superior Courts](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1e73a8fc25&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch**[c](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d0711855b1&e=1acd9bb3d6)[ongratulates inmates who completed drug treatment program](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=6bbd2120fb&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Senator Todd Young**[supports the Rosie the Riveter Congressional Gold Medal Act](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a60c84dbeb&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Senator Mike Braun**[b](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=3e326423fd&e=1acd9bb3d6)[elieves questions regarding presidential votes should be investigated](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=0ffde29aa1&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congresswoman Jackie Walorski** _[h](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=23cfdbb83c&e=1acd9bb3d6)_[ _onors and thanks veterans for their service_](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c6f75c11ad&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Jim Banks**[supports the Salvation Army's Red Kettle campaign](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=25451b88a2&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Jim Baird**[speaks at the bridge dedication ceremony for Staff Sgt. Jamie Jarboe](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d29a8d79f3&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congresswoman Susan Brooks **[r](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a519df0d08&e=1acd9bb3d6)[eceives 116th Congress Friend of Farm Bureau Award](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7aed416507&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Greg Pence**[tours the Atterbury Bakalar Air Museum with Veterans in Columbus](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=54adaeda5b&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Larry Bucshon **[wishes Happy Birthday to the U.S. Marine Corps](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1199811327&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Trey Hollingsworth **[_introduces legislation to support veteran-owned businesses_](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=cf2f73e479&e=1acd9bb3d6)

name: John James
subject: IMPORTANT: every vote must count
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the John James for Senate, Inc
body:
Peter - I have an important announcement, and I need you to
read this entire email.
This is incredibly personal to me. I put my life on
the line in Iraq to defend a fledgling democracy, and I flew
missions to protect free and fair elections. I care deeply about
the elections that take place in Michigan - my home, and where I
am raising my children.

This campaign is not about me, it never has been.
It's about making sure the People of Michigan have been heard
loud and clear.

Elections must be free, fair, and honest.
That is the principle at the foundation of our
democracy, and the People of Michigan deserve to know for a fact
that their vote has been counted. We must protect the integrity
of our electoral process above all else - if we do not, our
democracy will be in grave danger.
Voters must have confidence that our elections have
been conducted with integrity and that they were not
disenfranchised.
Although Senator Peters is ahead, I have deep
concerns that a sizable number of Michiganders may have been
disenfranchised.
That's why I have asked my team to investigate and
determine. I am 100% committed to making sure that every single
legal vote is counted.
I'm emailing you right now to help me fund this
fight for free and fair elections in Michigan - I need your help
to make sure my team has the resources they need to make sure
every valid ballot has been counted (you can donate here:
https://secure.winred.com/john-james-for-senate-inc/donate-1712512/)

When the process is complete, I will, of course,
accept the results and the will of the people.
But right now, there are enough widely reported
inconsistencies to warrant an investigation to ensure that
elections were conducted in a transparent, legal, and fair
manner. Those who object to this fair and legal process likely
have something to hide.
If you want to help me ensure that the People of
Michigan can trust democracy now and in the future, please help
me get the resources to continue the fight.
Donate here:
https://secure.winred.com/john-james-for-senate-inc/donate-1712512/
Let's Fly,

John James

Paid for by the John James for Senate, Inc.

Unsubscribe

An individual may contribute up to $2,800 and
Federal multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $5,000 towards
post-election efforts.
Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to
obtain and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name
of employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in
excess of $200 in an election cycle.
By providing your cell phone or mobile phone number
you are consenting to receive calls and texts, including
autodialed and automated calls and texts, to that number from
John James for Senate. Msg & data rates may apply. Terms &

But right now, there are enough widely reported inconsistencies to warrant an investigation to ensure that elections were conducted in a transparent, legal, and fair manner. Those who object to this fair and legal process likely have something to hide. If you want to help me ensure that the People of Michigan can trust democracy now and in the future, please help me get the resources to continue the fight. Donate here: Let's Fly, John James Paid for by the John James for Senate, Inc.

body:
The stock market is UP. | My Administration is achieving things
no one thought possible.

Peter,

Despite the Left's attempts
to undermine this Election, I will NEVER stop fighting for YOU.

My Administration is
achieving things no one thought possible - the stock market is up
BIG, the coronavirus vaccine is underway and will be completed
safely very soon.

We are accomplishing so much,
which is even more reason to step up and DEFEND THE ELECTION! We
cannot let the Democrats STEAL this Election from your all-time
favorite President. They'll DESTROY everything we've worked so
hard for.

I'm calling on YOU to FIGHT
BACK, Peter. We need to bolster our critical Election Defense
Fund if we're going to keep going. We can't do this without you.

Please contribute ANY AMOUNT
IMMEDIATELY to the Official Election Defense Fund and you can
increase your impact by 1000%. >>

CONTRIBUTE $250 = $2750

CONTRIBUTE $100 = $1100

CONTRIBUTE $50 = $550

CONTRIBUTE $45 = $495

CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT

I had such a big lead in
all of these key battleground states late into Election night,
only to see the leads miraculously disappear as the days went by.
Perhaps these leads will return as our legal proceedings move
forward, but only if we have the resources to KEEP FIGHTING!

You've never let me down
before and I know you won't start now.

Contribute ANY AMOUNT RIGHT
NOW to stand with me and to DEFEND the integrity of our Election.

Thank you,

Donald J. Trump

President of the United
States

CONTRIBUTE $45 = $495

body:
I needed to reach out today to talk to you about the Georgia Runoff Elections and what that means for our Republican Senate Majority. Last week, despite being outraised and outspent by HUNDREDS of millions of dollars, Senate Republicans defended CRITICAL seats all across the country.

**TO:** [**dpwillis67@gmail.com**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=370a47149fe445d5b4374bebd9ae5366&_e=LTsiSAYSEEWD6ScR_5_ebeARc0zarfQAzqYtAoIJ64RzBnGpDVznGHJY9suUILxBwRKFsBC5okdLSJTBhCRMVfT8U7pPdGVAevqcueE4B9-7ecUgdMmbVXh_H-6wKP0bd161XsHjhG5D4F8H0h5I18C9rt_8gdd3u440xDzCNi4zoHEfz6TxiTyqaR7LUWXKgMyoIqkdfxeaF0QOOFGftYo2wIY9wSkB817Q2zCgUxdLzVTJD2HBwivNDTaMQ-A85lq8y9LY8RugWuM457MZ-T29nttbFisX33lxt2lQ9zkb_cNTprOQpoUgkuqzTVvSkuIg9DKDKzs97cdyufaz8KcJ5rbjv5BeG_1IaZ4Vjr66rNibQ5TW4oLLTtqE7a0zUn5bfb-wuyfj2qyMhClncCSrKSEqZFx9gnESfCnqfkpZ5Vb05vs2kOEDBj3PkSib0UwRde85F6CUcpT4HxGj7Z1sHv9__Ih8A6Kn0W_HkWZumJ6EOHzTwZX0kdnaZszL-lTHEYoXm5UNI1_6Mk2THg%3D%3D)
**FROM:** Mitch McConnell
**SUBJECT:** The Georgia Runoff Elections

Peter--

I needed to reach out today to talk to you about the Georgia Runoff Elections and what that means for our Republican Senate Majority.

Last week, despite being outraised and outspent by HUNDREDS of millions of dollars, Senate Republicans defended CRITICAL seats all across the country.

However, our fight isn't over yet. ATLANTA - Today, conservative businesswoman and political outsider Kelly Loeffler condemned Raphael Warnock's [call](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Mrz6UJfvo0_dLpaabJTY6BlQ1XjG2llELq7xdyiaslZVRbZsLK2NWpzRHtVcYvj6BWPUw4NC4xcwI309oR8gEwi6xodMf8i3ZiY87TH2SO2YX3VPYKgUjFnISkCD1uycYyYESm7BAC6TWv3p-NOcMuggsyb__fffsWtxJZqrtJruCV2OX4HU3aD1qfz1u9uM&c=XO2jWifaLyc4Pu6V0z1xBKknhvVg2704yZFjyg8-9ral3syrMCHMiA==&ch=YH4wxP0eyvUlsweZlL2foMaxAUJ-3FLtqVDb5eL3m75zngkPoqEU0Q==) for America to "repent for its worship of whiteness." name: =?utf-8?Q?Patrick=20Kibbe?=
subject: We have much to be proud of in this race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pat Hackett for Congress
body:
Over 114,000 people voted for Pat. It's the most votes a Democrat has received in this race since it was an open seat without an incumbent in 2012. | | | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=860cabd2d7&e=5886ca081d)
---
| | | Dear Friend,

Thank you for your support of this campaign. We have spent the last week analyzing the results of this election and want to share some numbers with you. While the ultimate result is not what we had hoped for, there is much we accomplished together.

Over 114,000 people voted for Pat. This is the highest number of votes a Democrat has received in this race since it was an open seat without an incumbent in 2012.

To accomplish that, the campaign worked for nearly 18 months, and in the final push in the last eight weeks alone we built a team of over 300 volunteers, made over 50,000 calls, sent over 100,000 texts, met with thousands at our online and socially distanced in-person events, and reached hundreds of thousands more through TV, radio, and digital platforms. The result of this effort is that over 75% of the voters we contacted turned out to vote, compared to 47% voter turnout overall. This shows the power of our strategy and volunteer effort in turning out the vote.

Pat raised approximately $950,000 and over 95% of these contributions were from individual donors. None was from corporate PACs or from self-financing. Pat followed through with her commitment to be responsible to the people of this District, not outside corporate interests.

All of this was done in an unprecedented pandemic that limited many of the traditional ways we could meet, but did not stop our people-powered effort. Pat received national media attention, including from the New York Times, Newsweek, Marie Claire, NBC News, Time Magazine, and others. Pat is the first candidate in this District to be endorsed by a Presidential nominee who won the Presidency, Joe Biden, and a former Presidential nominee, Pete Buttigieg.

Unfortunately, our shared effort was not enough to win the race. The state of Indiana and this District were hit with a red wave, and Democrats did not turn out in the same numbers as Republicans. For example, 75% of the strongest Republicans turned out to vote, but only 65% of the strongest Democrats did. Similarly, 53% of moderate Republicans voted, but only 41% of moderate Democrats did. There was also a significant increase in Republican straight ticket voters. In 2016 and 2018 there were approximately 65,000 and 69,000 Republican straight ticket votes in IN02, respectively. This year there was approximately 97,000 – a 41% increase. Comparatively, only approximately 56,000 Democrats voted straight ticket this year, a 27% increase from approximately 45,000 in 2018.

This occurred even in St. Joseph County, which has long been the Democratic stronghold in this District. In 2016 there were approximately 19,000 Republican straight ticket votes in St. Joseph County and in 2018 there were approximately 21,000. This year there were almost 35,000 – a 63% increase. Nonetheless, Pat still won St. Joseph County. Out of the 14 competitive races at the federal, state, and county level in St. Joseph County, Democrats won only four – Joe Biden for President, Pat Hackett for U.S. Representative, Jonathan Weinzapfel for Attorney General, and Ryan Dvorak for State Representative District 8. Pat received the second highest votes of any Democrat in St. Joseph County at 58,859 votes, trailing only Joe Biden by 1,000 votes, and winning with 51.34% of the vote.

The numbers show a path forward – one that we have seen from the start. This race is not about the Republicans’ gerrymandering or corporate PAC money. It is about getting out the vote. If everyone in this District voted, Democrats would win with over 50.6% of the vote. COVID-19 made that a challenge in this historic year. We must build a stronger infrastructure as a party, continue to organize, and continue to believe that each and every vote matters in every county in this District. Going forward, we must also ensure that voter files are not unlawfully purged, continue to register new voters, and continue to target and strengthen areas of disenfranchised voters.

As Pat often quoted on the campaign trail from Eleanor Roosevelt’s statement at the 1940 Democratic Convention, “No one candidate on his or her own can carry this alone. It can only be carried by a united people who love their county.”

We are proud of what we accomplished together. We know there is more work to do. We are ready to do it because Dignity and Justice for All is worth fighting for. Pat, I, and the entire team thank you for joining us in this effort.

Patrick Kibbe
Campaign Manager

---
| | | | | | | | [](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=5830f412d4&e=5886ca081d)

name: Bettina Weiss
subject: you made this happen
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [ ](https://act.myngp.com/el/vCR9IDH2oOUQOPmbdmiAKazFskoCoefhDPrLCX0HGfI=/ZFmBgrBKVngI9bT00ATnEdhsqDA-vyKysV5sVXe7XgY=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20201114-1-EM&amount=25)
---
| Peter,

**[We did it!](https://act.myngp.com/el/vCR9IDH2oOUQOPmbdmiAKazFskoCoefhDPrLCX0HGfI=/ZFmBgrBKVngI9bT00ATnEdhsqDA-vyKysV5sVXe7XgY=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20201114-1-EM&amount=25)** Abigail won re-election and will continue to fight for Central Virginians in Congress in the coming years. None of this would have been possible without continued support from people like you.

**[That 's why I wanted to reach out to acknowledge and thank our grassroots donors for making this campaign possible. ](https://act.myngp.com/el/vCR9IDH2oOUQOPmbdmiAKazFskoCoefhDPrLCX0HGfI=/ZFmBgrBKVngI9bT00ATnEdhsqDA-vyKysV5sVXe7XgY=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20201114-1-EM&amount=25)**Here are just some of the people who generously donated to our campaign:
---
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/vCR9IDH2oOUQOPmbdmiAKazFskoCoefhDPrLCX0HGfI=/ZFmBgrBKVngI9bT00ATnEdhsqDA-vyKysV5sVXe7XgY=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20201114-1-EM&amount=25)
Running a campaign isn't easy. Running a campaign during an unprecedented global pandemic is even harder, but we made it work. People like Annette, Elijah, and Maria made both our campaign and Abigail's win possible.

**[Every single contribution pushed us across the finish line.](https://act.myngp.com/el/vCR9IDH2oOUQOPmbdmiAKazFskoCoefhDPrLCX0HGfI=/ZFmBgrBKVngI9bT00ATnEdhsqDA-vyKysV5sVXe7XgY=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20201114-1-EM&amount=25)** They allowed us to call potential voters, match demand for yard signs, and run positive ads on the issues.

Republicans were determined to buy this seat back. They flooded the airwaves in our district with attack ads filled with lies against Abigail. Your support allowed us to fight back and set the record straight.

**[Abigail is determined to fight for every last person in her district and the issues that matter to them.](https://act.myngp.com/el/vCR9IDH2oOUQOPmbdmiAKazFskoCoefhDPrLCX0HGfI=/ZFmBgrBKVngI9bT00ATnEdhsqDA-vyKysV5sVXe7XgY=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20201114-1-EM&amount=25)** She'll do all she can to protect access to healthcare, hold pharmaceutical companies accountable, and build back our small businesses.

Thank you, again. You made this possible.

_Bettina_

Friend,
Yesterday our team made a goal of reaching 15,000 donations by the end of the week to help State Republicans prepare to defend our majorities in states like **Georgia, Pennsylvania, Florida, Kansas, Montana, and New Hampshire.**
Thankfully a lot of patriots who want to save our Republican State Majorities from the radical Left stepped up and helped us make an impressive start towards reaching our goal.
**But here 's the bad news:** while people did step up, we still have a ways to go before the Sunday deadline.
**That 's why we're reaching out to you today, Friend! **

Friend,

Let me explain.

Control of the Senate will be decided by two runoff elections in January. **If my Republican colleagues lose, then Chuck Schumer will become Majority Leader and Democrats could have total control of Washington.**

Will you step up right now and become a founding member? == == Your action today will determine the foundation of our campaign over the next two years. We know Todd is looking forward to seeing you become a Founding Member. Can he count on you? == Thank you for your support. Contributions from individuals to Elect Republicans of up to $5,000 per year are designated to the Elect Republicans candidate contribution account. Any amount over $5,000 per year is designated to the Elect Republicans Carey account.

name: Team Warner
subject: Your weekly update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | | If you would like more information about how to slow and stop the spread of COVID-19, **[take a look at these resources from the Centers for Disease Control (CDC).](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d9a2/53d9897e/550fcc66/1c88d1a5/3187189537/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.cdc.gov/coronavirus/2019-ncov/index.html")**
---

Derek --

The people of Virginia have spoken, and they're sending Mark Warner back to the Senate to serve another term. He's grateful for your support and eager for the opportunity to continue working to provide resources and create opportunity for everyone in the Commonwealth. Our team will continue to send these weekly updates to make sure folks know what Mark is working on in the Senate.

**Here 's the latest: **
* **[The people of Virginia re-elected Mark to represent them for third term in the Senate.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d9a2/53d9897e/550fcc66/1c88d1a4/3187189537/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://fredericksburg.com/news/local/sen-mark-warner-fends-off-gop-challenger-daniel-gade-wins-third-term/article_228dd1a4-eda2-58f3-890b-03ebd70b2311.html")** He is excited to continue working to make health care and prescription drugs more affordable, make sure Virginians have the resources they need to make it through the coronavirus pandemic, and continue building an economy that works for everyone, regardless of their ZIP code.

* Mark spoke out in support of **[Chris Krebs, director of the Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA)](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d9a2/53d9897e/550fcc66/1c88d1a3/3187189537/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.washingtonpost.com/politics/2020/11/13/cybersecurity-202-officials-say-firing-dhs-cyber-chief-could-make-us-less-safe-election-process-continues/")**. Krebs is responsible for protecting our elections from interference, and worked with leaders on both sides of the aisle to ensure that CISA was a trusted source of information about election security. Mark says there is "no possible justification to remove him from office."

* Mark joined Senator Tim Kaine in **[sending a letter to Emily Murphy, head of the General Services Administration](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d9a2/53d9897e/550fcc66/1c88d1a2/3187189537/VEsC/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://foreignpolicy.com/2020/11/12/trump-congress-transition-biden/")** , after the agency refused to certify the results of the election and confirm Joe Biden as president-elect. Refusal to certify the election results will delay the transition process and could undermine public faith in our electoral process.

* Mark joined the Kojo Nnamdi show to **[discuss his re-election and the path to repairing damage from the Trump administration](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d9a2/53d9897e/550fcc66/1c88d1a1/3187189537/VEsD/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://thekojonnamdishow.org/shows/2020-11-13/the-politics-hour-november-13-2020")** through action in the Senate. He also discussed election security and his legislative priorities and committed to fighting for the economic relief that Virginians need during the coronavirus pandemic.

Thank you again for your support!

-- Team Warner

[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d9a2/53d9897e/550fcc66/1c88d1a0/3187189537/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijk0MyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=20201114_e_3_fl__943__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")
---

**Hey friend – do you have a second to answer just one question for me?**

A lot has happened over the past few days.

After an unprecedented Election Week, we’re still waiting to see how the presidential race will unfold and we’re not going to know who’s going to control the Senate until early January.

Needless to say, there’s a lot up in the air right now, and that’s why I want your opinion on this question that I’ve been seeing get asked a lot lately:
[ ](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=e3c70c16f05e46dd8538a0e0c3065cc3&_e=SeVT9sBZ67PFZfnnQTvAi92RgfYRr1hxUAvtfH83A9SM6ZtF7sntCh7g7vicizq0ULYgbMxg7vtWUHMoCR-T1LaiQf2vFI4l-ZLTbl2hQ_mrxWy3C9Ce6NTQmyrSxSu5HQq9UGIPFEh1AVIcY-aSQZi1WngmQxLcVGiKz6jPsIWnc6FpG30s_51zATrad_L73qULus7TotfATqe_UJsGQ2tL8qkugOzI0nypf6YjRuq1rqdxlaIUUVC1hERzm0BQJFphFA8oMsAYMahwFNVe_dMgHSoAQsyJfjh9pqz39GRp89rw0qAm7j3r3G5ThqThxBtb3zKP91xrP4JOSGRAOWEopPvAuH7l6hulcz4oPJnGpwSGrcq7_w3a2vyxgmVZnCWJqB_YtynNIlT4OQZ6fgUtUwMuYLsujMUPzJSL2UCrQPytCO6L4svnHi3Z608q3P1K061HWmeX2cC6ns7oM93sv0JLxiEE9vSWfCqaATk%3D)
Friend, I have no doubt that things are going to keep happening at a rapid pace over the coming weeks and months.

Democrats are putting it all on the line to take over the White House, Congress, and the Senate, and if that happens, there will be almost no checks and balances against their progressive agenda.

That’s why I believe it’s important for Americans to pause and think about the direction that our country is headed in – and what we can do to change it.

**[Click here to take our Right Track/Wrong Track survey and share your thoughts on the direction that America is going in>>>](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=e3c70c16f05e46dd8538a0e0c3065cc3&_e=SeVT9sBZ67PFZfnnQTvAi92RgfYRr1hxUAvtfH83A9SM6ZtF7sntCh7g7vicizq0ULYgbMxg7vtWUHMoCR-T1LaiQf2vFI4l-ZLTbl2hQ_mrxWy3C9Ce6NTQmyrSxSu5HQq9UGIPFEh1AVIcY-aSQZi1WngmQxLcVGiKz6jPsIWnc6FpG30s_51zATrad_L73qULus7TotfATqe_UJsGQ2tL8qkugOzI0nypf6YjRuq1rqdxlaIUUVC1hERzm0BQJFphFA8oMsAYMahwFNVe_agDG3EbvHE-uXEYQw-V2ctLBjDCC-hya93AjaPDzv5QNb72mCMb1oUnbNyFsBhyoA6M_gp7b6a6TUyvJtTbV6V8r9bEvkQbrx1s_6QcHDGMZ1K_YeI1cX3VltxCxAZ5qmXIXBtEDo5Cw_JF6z-NPTQMTi6sWgY6uk3EHI76HbldFlMMdhEMcuVSnmPYBfxcHOmRya1ggWJhCGb8nxObrDs%3D)**

Thank you,
Darin LaHood

name: Jason Yates, My Faith Votes
subject: Post Election Poll - We want to hear from you.
body:
Peter,
After one of the most important elections of our lifetime, we want to ask you six simple questions that will help us understand how to better equip Christians with valuable civic resources.
**[Take our quick poll](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=aJk8h51aJG24nPB0Qc8G0A4-fX7LhCSrOgsPNMeR0Gn5BgQOtUZ4cdkRpvHqAALP&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201114srv01nd&n=1)** and share with us if you voted and what helped inform your decisions.
Our goal is to help Christians pray, think biblically, and vote in every election. Your feedback is invaluable to our mission at My Faith Votes.
When Christians stand united for biblical values, we will see God honored in the public square.
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=aJk8h51aJG24nPB0Qc8G0A4-fX7LhCSrOgsPNMeR0Gn5BgQOtUZ4cdkRpvHqAALP&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201114srv01nd&n=2)
**United. We Stand.**
Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201114srv01nd&n=3)
©2020 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker Rd, #640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201114srv01nd&n=4).

name: DonaldJTrump.com
subject: You’ll never believe this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great
body:
The stock market is UP. | My Administration is achieving things
no one thought possible.

Peter,

Despite the Left's attempts
to undermine this Election, I will NEVER stop fighting for YOU.

My Administration is
achieving things no one thought possible - the stock market is up
BIG, the coronavirus vaccine is underway and will be completed
safely very soon.

We are accomplishing so much,
which is even more reason to step up and DEFEND THE ELECTION! We
cannot let the Democrats STEAL this Election from your all-time
favorite President. They'll DESTROY everything we've worked so
hard for.

I'm calling on YOU to FIGHT
BACK, Peter. We need to bolster our critical Election Defense
Fund if we're going to keep going. We can't do this without you.

Please contribute ANY AMOUNT
IMMEDIATELY to the Official Election Defense Fund and you can
increase your impact by 1000%. >>

CONTRIBUTE $250 = $2750

CONTRIBUTE $100 = $1100

CONTRIBUTE $50 = $550

CONTRIBUTE $45 = $495

CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT

I had such a big lead in
all of these key battleground states late into Election night,
only to see the leads miraculously disappear as the days went by.
Perhaps these leads will return as our legal proceedings move
forward, but only if we have the resources to KEEP FIGHTING!

You've never let me down
before and I know you won't start now.

Contribute ANY AMOUNT RIGHT
NOW to stand with me and to DEFEND the integrity of our Election.

Thank you,

Donald J. Trump

President of the United
States

purposes.

grassroots supporters with the most up-to-date information

It's because of grassroots supporters like you that we will Make

for all that you do!

subject: IMPORTANT: every vote must count

body:
Elections must be free, fair, and honest. [ ](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=a0f00bef72034bc0a6a6e9c937dd77ba&_e=CtcJaQQs2iSi-bWU0rFljmFAcE8_SWNOgXUi0Xr2fl4YmeN0e0zGMZC4Bz1YHB_JTSqlVwlWbd-CsmfNCTjXdfI4wzXHqonEX3rk4EnXCuZ2zEWOGzs6pejQQvcC3m3SSojQiUJSBqy5va0_bnDMbis2I3KwGvzHHyCfqpwKnbRNBFXk_3zMs1aRf2VwQcTjfecoP2xvH4p5Pmche1LnM1hgbJ0XdDWgeGbYhQ1KrmwYt_aEqaz0B8ebajBESJ95ZQXFDZrhVBWxY4uRAnb4yn8Obl0nYzj7AtaDeVFGtaMFgAUn1uA0A8t3yWr0SxFE6xGoNg7SbnqrHTc5yvqN9yiY1W6GlX5RbwpdLWlhoEt9Ueo0TVGtVrNtxODcYWIKQRD35Gl5axLPPJtvpUOkcw%3D%3D) **Peter - I have an important announcement, and I need you to read this entire email.**
This is incredibly personal to me. I put my life on the line in Iraq to defend a fledgling democracy, and I flew missions to protect free and fair elections. I care deeply about the elections that take place in Michigan — my home, and where I am raising my children. This campaign is not about me, it never has been. It’s about making sure the People of Michigan have been heard loud and clear. Elections must be free, fair, and honest.
That is the principle at the foundation of our democracy, and the People of Michigan deserve to know for a fact that their vote has been counted. We must protect the integrity of our electoral process above all else — if we do not, our democracy will be in grave danger.
Voters _must_ have confidence that our elections have been conducted with integrity and that they were not disenfranchised.
Although Senator Peters is ahead, I have deep concerns that a sizable number of Michiganders may have been disenfranchised.
**That’s why I have asked my team to investigate and determine. I am 100% committed to making sure that every single legal vote is counted.**
**I’m emailing you right now to help me fund this fight for free and fair elections in Michigan — I need your help to make sure my team has the resources they need to make sure every valid ballot has been counted(you can donate here: [https://secure.winred.com/john-james-for-senate-inc/donate-1712512/)](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=a0f00bef72034bc0a6a6e9c937dd77ba&_e=CtcJaQQs2iSi-bWU0rFljmFAcE8_SWNOgXUi0Xr2fl4YmeN0e0zGMZC4Bz1YHB_JTSqlVwlWbd-CsmfNCTjXdfI4wzXHqonEX3rk4EnXCuZ2zEWOGzs6pejQQvcC3m3SSojQiUJSBqy5va0_bnDMbis2I3KwGvzHHyCfqpwKnbRNBFXk_3zMs1aRf2VwQcTjSFjUC4gP2MlRvaObdDg04_7x-fsOohX4rhoAFtPs_tD0jZXekGoxnV6Jw15FPqVbNf9C8ASKlKdmmiHClxeyN_PVkFOWINjkklW8lUkpL0qBoVWCBf99Hp8kSbBnBNfwIbiPMQLL0WF-SILISAgtgj8sC5oqJlUmhyvh-7KlYG5WDqgpVydtABRE3lvc0K5n0lSiALBhlG6ZXjVlPURLOw%3D%3D) **
**When the process is complete, I will, of course, accept the results and the will of the people. **
But right now, there are enough widely reported inconsistencies to warrant an investigation to ensure that elections were conducted in a transparent, legal, and fair manner. Those who object to this fair and legal process likely have something to hide.
If you want to help me ensure that the People of Michigan can trust democracy now and in the future, please help me get the resources to continue the fight.
**Donate here:[https://secure.winred.com/john-james-for-senate-inc/donate-1712512/](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=a0f00bef72034bc0a6a6e9c937dd77ba&_e=CtcJaQQs2iSi-bWU0rFljmFAcE8_SWNOgXUi0Xr2fl4YmeN0e0zGMZC4Bz1YHB_JTSqlVwlWbd-CsmfNCTjXdfI4wzXHqonEX3rk4EnXCuZ2zEWOGzs6pejQQvcC3m3SSojQiUJSBqy5va0_bnDMbis2I3KwGvzHHyCfqpwKnbRNBFXk_3zMs1aRf2VwQcTjYRColLLEzvYq-D_MPwq_GUdkDg2QuR2mxiHqVcqoH8-tU2OZfLsdRqVTf4lmJSTEXkoTp7-eJQ0RyTpX27Lxvn0jqb4t1GnODKqrT9IHiNwgtUnK0x9KIwFSpgubEdNJt0IR-FPuhR1q7TZetPCftc0_0esNaHKcHniCmye2Krtm2RVltNFKjrlBj1iCKvJEwjejXbLlp_bJq8jYYN511Q%3D%3D)**
Let’s Fly, John James |

name: True the Vote
subject: Daily Update - Nov. 14
body:
| | | | [](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=313A723A20A3258)
---
| | Hello friends and I hope you all are having a good weekend!

Last week was a whirlwind! As of yesterday, True the Vote is now involved in four substantial lawsuits that seek to thoroughly investigate the vote counts in Pennsylvania, Michigan, Wisconsin, and Georgia - the top states where we have heard some of the most concerning stories about election inconsistencies and potential vote fraud in the wake of the most recent elections. While the mainstream media has been content to move on, to declare their preferred candidate-Joe Biden-the winner, we feel strongly that the American people deserve to know exactly what votes were illegally counted and where election malfeasance took place. While the data we seek very well might not change the outcome, we will never know unless we actually take the time to look at what happened and to verify that every vote counted was a legal vote. We want the truth and we will get the truth.
I look forward to sending you daily updates on what is happening with our litigation and with election issues in general as this process continues to play out in the courts. Our work is much bigger than just one election, we are committed to getting to the root of election fraud in this country so that we can identify where reforms are needed and restore the confidence that so many Americans have lost in our election system.

Onward,

---
| |
---
| | Catherine Engelbrecht
Founder, True the Vote
---
| | NEWS YOU CAN USE
---
| | **[The Federalist: Partisans Cheating By Ignoring Election Law Is A Problem As Big As Vote Fraud](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=313A723A20A3255)**

Fraud represents only one aspect of concern over the results from last week’s election. Of equal import when judging the legitimacy of the next president of the United States is whether states complied with the election rules established by their legislatures. These are not questions of mere "technical errors," but raise significant constitutional concerns.
---
| |
---
|
---
| | ****[WBTV: N.C. elections board reviewing video showing election irregularities after WBTV investigation](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=313A723A20A3256)****

The North Carolina State Board of Elections said Friday it was reviewing video taken inside the Anson County Board of Elections building showing people voting. The video, which was first published by WBTV on Thursday, shows the husband of a candidate for local office, among others, repeatedly approaching voters in the parking lot and escorting them into the voting booth.
---
| |
---
|
---
| | ******[Breitbart: Georgia’s GOP Congressional Reps Demand Answers About Alleged Voter Irregularities](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=313A723A20A3257)******

Members of the U.S. House of Representatives Congressional Delegation for Georgia sent a letter Tuesday to Georgia Secretary of State Brad Raffensperger requesting information regarding allegations of voter irregularities in the Peach State’s 2020 presidential election.
---
| | ******T RUE THE VOTE'S LEGAL EFFORTS ON BEHALF OF THE VOTERS**

Friend,

This is a fight to preserve our Country’s future and we won’t win unless every Patriot, including you, steps up RIGHT NOW.

---

**We have to meet our mid-month fundraising deadline to have any hope of winning this Senate runoff. **

Chuck Schumer and National Democrats are all-in on flipping the Senate blue. It's all they need to take complete control of Congress and enact their left-wing agenda.

We have to meet EVERY goal from now until the election, and your support right now is critical. [**Rush a 6X MATCHED donation before the deadline!**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f54772c84f1a4f6ba46d2b664ca8705d&_e=QUeGE0l2uzlM4drmdZcLraeC_cnvoIc0KGUtYgHKfDKCJ7hWTCJ5ywCWMngP_WjrAim1o1feY6HTKCQ-kYaYPn5u4K5nV8P0ihlkTxGL9gHtLfCNm1Wwc2T8u4_IRXsZ0CekF_4gsVjOmRN8uxRut4cjK75WNglkfVbs6Xg_iaGjVlKPVeNii5l6x7wf3vPZsGRKjjf--1mvlKC6rSw68cAl3HZ3iixMJSdywXW3UAzOA5JJAQn-d9lzdRVlC2zuHUcIoQUAksB2mjNV4yaY8JeGRJr62esDTgi76FVGuYMQv4E_jWKB3_gM-Zq1RyIJJe9eCmmE4-dHU2iEAEFTTof_BE7mhhPW2zYecRuIvbj5rfXZ_899ESf44XOJODVYPMkBiGLVOl4q7WnVN_uwbphC3OiaYjPMREwn6uo0bdxaePN93Bz-7fVgtJk-7PcgKOVvm_cZfnT2UXXVQf8VQ9uS7ede88jNsaKgMKB5W0Qz8ZzfVXXy07N1eUVdenu7)

**The Democrats are going to give us a very tough fight, and we have to get our campaign ready. **

[**Our mid-month fundraising deadline is quickly approaching. Please donate now to help us get started off strong and beat the Democrats.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f54772c84f1a4f6ba46d2b664ca8705d&_e=QUeGE0l2uzlM4drmdZcLraeC_cnvoIc0KGUtYgHKfDKCJ7hWTCJ5ywCWMngP_WjrAim1o1feY6HTKCQ-kYaYPn5u4K5nV8P0ihlkTxGL9gHtLfCNm1Wwc2T8u4_IRXsZ0CekF_4gsVjOmRN8uxRut4cjK75WNglkfVbs6Xg_iaGjVlKPVeNii5l6x7wf3vPZsGRKjjf--1mvlKC6rSw68cAl3HZ3iixMJSdywXW3UAzOA5JJAQn-d9lzdRVlC2zuHUcIoQUAksB2mjNV4yaY8JeGRJr62esDTgi76FVGuYMa--uZNsJjO448CYS3BU_sVLY8ZWAmu_PGY6LY6HSBIheFmuGbyzryu8cDsPp4xL84G9yqRcDWY7aXndPepFG633nm03LyyXtNADZgmU5NKHj_xn8l_CzkqqV2PxizbZc9J28QnnvPcn0Pc0Mj5aXGi4e-WnaJ5gmU6rCO4pAeXQGnpgsUt5G_YDoaW00GTeHyG6z9xNEnDl1U0QMCz9Bg)

I can't do this alone. I'm depending on your support, or we will lose the Senate!

Thank you,

Kelly Loeffler

subject: VIDEO: Senator David Perdue: We're Standing In The Breach Against Socialism
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PERDUE FOR SENATE**
body:
|
---
| |
---
| |
---
| | | **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
November 14, 2020
---
| | **CONTACT:**
**John Burke** \- Communications Director - john@perduesenate.com
**Casey Black** \- Senior Spokeswoman - casey@perduesenate.com
---
| | **VIDEO: Senator David Perdue: We're Standing In The Breach Against Socialism**
---
| **ATLANTA, GA -** Yesterday at a Defend the Majority Rally for U.S. Senators David Perdue and Kelly Loeffler in Forsyth County, Senator Perdue spoke about the importance of saving the Republican majority to protect America and stop the Democrats’ radical socialist agenda.

_“Every generation faces its moment of truth - this is our moment of truth,”**said Senator Perdue.** “Schumer will change the rules up there. He wants to add two states and four [Senate] seats. He wants to pack the Supreme Court, y’all. We’re not going to let that happen.”

“They really want to be defunding the police when we should be defending the police,” **he continued.** “They want open borders and sanctuary cities - tell me how that's going to make our neighborhoods safer? It’s not. They want to reduce the size of our military, just like Barack Obama did, just like Bill Clinton did. We cannot let that happen. They want to take our private health insurance that we get from our employer - 180 million people - they want to take it away from us. They voted against funding for the Paycheck Protection Program, which saved 1.5 million jobs in Georgia. In addition to that, they want the Green New Deal."

“What we have to do is very simple: we have to get our vote out. Kelly and I are asking you to stand with us. Stand in the breach against socialism.”_
---
| [ ](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=e34a828c32&e=02cd889ad3 "Sen. David Perdue Speaks At The Defend The Majority Rally In Forsyth County")
---

---
